title: cineraria viscosa
intro: Cineraria viscosa, also known as sticky cineraria, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it beneficial in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of cineraria viscosa include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, which is attributed to its active compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
